title: Junior SEO Specialist at Park Avenue

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Park Avenue
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!
